name: Multiple Unsub - JFrog
brief: In an "investigation of a malicious machine-learning model...The model’s payload grants the attacker a shell on the compromised machine, enabling them to gain full control over victims’ machines through what is commonly referred to as a “backdoor”...It’s crucial to emphasize that when we refer to “malicious models”, we specifically denote those housing real, harmful payloads. Our analysis has pinpointed around 100 instances of such models to date... Source
categories: LL  Models used for backdoor deployment
